params.name: Karl Benz Tricycle
params.description:
On Jul 5, 1886 AD, Karl Benz made the world's first single-cylinder engine tricycle car.
After years of research and design, Karl Benz manufactured a single-cylinder gasoline engine and installed it on the frame of a tricycle, successfully inventing the first car. At that time, this car had various shortcomings, but Benz's wife bravely tested it herself and drove the car for more than 100 kilometers, verifying its practicality and ultimately contributing to the birth of this great invention.
